company_description: Monzo is a UK-based digital bank with a heavy data and AI-driven infrastructure.
Revolut is a global fintech platform offering banking payments and ML-driven fraud detection.
Deliveroo is an online food delivery platform using ML for ETA and recommendations.
Factorial is an HR management platform for SMBs and mid-market companies in Europe.
Personio is an all-in-one HR platform for European SMBs with growing AI features.
SumUp provides mobile POS and payment solutions for small businesses worldwide.
Klarna is a buy now pay later fintech using LLMs for customer service and fraud detection.
Contentful is a headless CMS platform now integrating AI-powered content generation.
Pleo is a business spend management platform using AI for receipt processing and categorization.
Tessian uses ML to protect enterprise email from misdirected emails and data loss.
Laka is a collective insurance platform using ML for claims and risk assessment.
Pigment is a business planning platform using AI to forecast and model business scenarios.
ConductorOne is an identity security platform for access governance and compliance.
Leapsome is an employee enablement platform for performance reviews and learning.
sennder is a digital freight forwarder using ML for pricing routing and load matching.
